purpose: Recruit SDRs and appointment setters with a human-centric train-prove-get-paid narrative and transparent, escrow-backed outcome pay.
audienceTask: Decide whether to join Cold Call Reps to train, prove skill, and earn per verified result on brand deals.

audienceTask.evidence: Primary JTBD documented: SDRs evaluating training + paid brand deals with no earning ceiling.

distinctValue.evidence: Home is the canonical rep-recruiting entry; feature rows now pair real SDR imagery with product mock UI and a distinct 'Fair & transparent' mechanism section.

claimIntegrity.evidence: Claims '$0 to join / brand campaigns free for reps', 'no cap on earnings', 'brands fund escrow up front', and 'verified results' trace to public/llms.txt and src/lib/product.ts (ev-llms-product, ev-platform-fees). No numeric performance metrics fabricated; rep cards labeled illustrative/not paid endorsements.

completeExperience.evidence: Direct value prop, mechanism (train/prove/apply/get paid), fairness limitations (verified, escrow), and CTAs to marketpounce sign-up and /pricing.

discovery.evidence: Linked from global header/footer, sitemap priority 1.0, and internal links to /for/reps and /pricing.

distinctUrlPurpose.evidence: Home does not duplicate /for/reps (deep SDR path) or /pricing (plans); it frames and routes to both.

questions.question: Does it cost anything to join brand campaigns as a rep?
questions.answerLocation: Proof bar '$0 to join' + 'Fair & transparent' section

questions.question: Is there a cap on what I can earn?
questions.answerLocation: Hero sub + 'Your hours, your ceiling' trust point

questions.question: How do I know the pay is fair and I will actually get paid?
questions.answerLocation: 'Honest work. Honest pay.' section (escrow funded, verified, released)
